subject: CONGRATULATIONS! You've WON $1,000,000!!!
body: Dear valued customer, you have been selected as the winner of our monthly sweepstakes. Click here to claim your prize immediately. Act now before this offer expires!

subject: Team meeting tomorrow at 10 AM
body:
Hi team,

Just a reminder that we have our weekly standup tomorrow at 10 AM in Conference Room B. Please come prepared with your updates.

Best,
Sarah
gold_response: Thanks Sarah, I'll be there at 10 AM with my updates ready.

subject: Invoice #4821 attached
body:
Hello,

Please find attached invoice #4821 for the consulting services rendered in February. Payment is due within 30 days.

Regards,
Accounting Department
gold_response: Forwarding this invoice to the finance team for processing.

subject: RE: Your subscription has been renewed
body: This is a confirmation that your annual subscription to CloudTools Pro has been renewed. Your next billing date is March 15, 2027. No action required.

subject: Can you review my pull request?
body:
Hey,

I just opened PR #342 for the authentication refactor. It's a pretty small change — just swapped the JWT library. Could you take a look when you get a chance?

Thanks!
gold_response: Sure Mike, I'll review PR #342 this afternoon. Thanks for the heads up.

subject: Happy Birthday! 🎂
body: Happy birthday! Hope you have an amazing day. Let's grab lunch soon to celebrate!
gold_response: Thank you Lisa! That's so kind. Would love to catch up over lunch — how about Friday?

subject: System maintenance this weekend
body:
Dear users,

Planned maintenance will occur Saturday 2 AM - 6 AM EST. Services may be intermittently unavailable. No action required on your part.

IT Operations

subject: Welcome to the team!
body:
Hi,

I'm James, the new data engineer joining your team starting next Monday. Looking forward to meeting everyone! Is there anything I should prepare before my first day?

Best,
James Rivera
gold_response: Welcome James! Great to have you on the team. No special preparation needed — we'll get you set up on Monday. Looking forward to meeting you!

subject: Quarterly report is ready
body:
Hi,

The Q4 financial report has been finalized and uploaded to the shared drive. Please review at your convenience.

Finance Team
gold_response: Thanks for the update. I'll review the Q4 report this week.

subject: Unsubscribe confirmation
body: You have been successfully unsubscribed from our marketing emails. You will no longer receive promotional content from us.

subject: Lunch order for today
body:
Hey everyone,

I'm placing a group lunch order from Thai Palace. Send me your orders by 11:30 AM. Menu is in the shared channel.

Cheers,
Alex
gold_response: Thanks Alex! I'll have the Pad Thai with chicken please.

subject: Password reset request
body: We received a request to reset the password for your account. If you did not make this request, please ignore this email. Otherwise, click the link below to reset your password.
gold_response: I did not request a password reset. This may be a security concern — please investigate.

subject: Approved: Your PTO request
body:
Your paid time off request for March 20-24 has been approved. Enjoy your time off!

— HR System

subject: Client feedback on the demo
body:
Hi,

The client loved the demo yesterday! They want to proceed to the contract stage. Great work from the whole team.

Best,
David (Sales)
gold_response: That's great news David! Thanks for letting us know. Happy to support the contract discussions.

subject: FREE VIAGRA — Limited Time Offer!!!
body: Buy now and get 90% off! No prescription needed! Click here for amazing deals! This offer won't last!
